race.comment: Open race to close out the card. RHEGION (11) got the job done over this track and trip two back before just running into one better at Cairns at the latest outing. Gets Wiggins on board to negate the wide draw and should be right there when the judge calls a halt. CARPACCIO (6) is having his first run for the new yard but should find this easier than recent outings. Monitor market moves. KEEP ON RUNNING (5) is drawn to get all the favours from the inside alley and saves his best form for his home circuit here. Top-three conveyance. MOOLOOLABA (8) gets 2kg off with the claim and may earn some minor money. PROMINENT LAD (10) next best.
